violations.text: Dessert food items repackaged in the food establishment are lacking proper labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Food item label information is available at the POS, but items are lacking necessary allergen information at /on the item packaging. PIC is to keep repackaged food items behind the counter until proper labels are produced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

Knives used for food prep were observed stored on the prep counter under the hot hold steam unit. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Knives were adjusted for proper storage at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets to several refrigeration units were observed in poor repair. Equipment is to be repaired and adjusted in accordance with manufacturer's specifications. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025

The ceiling in the kitchen area is covered with a surface that is not smooth, and easily cleanable. Ceilings shall be designed, constructed, and installed so they are SMOOTH and EASILY CLEANABLE. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
